name: primihub-e2e-test
description: PrimiHub 平台端到端自动化测试

commands.name: test-all
commands.description: 运行全量测试（路由+API+交互）
commands.command: bash -c 'python3 test-tools/e2e_all_167.py && python3 test-tools/api_test_all.py && python3 test-tools/e2e_final_v5.py'

commands.name: test-routes
commands.description: 测试所有前端路由页面

commands.name: test-api
commands.description: 测试全部 223 个 API 功能点
